data.name: Corruption of Champions II
data.detailed_description:
Corruption of Champions II (or CoC2 for short) is a text-based adventure game in which you contend with an invasion of perverse demons into your home realm, all the while romancing hot monstergirls (and furries, orcs, elves, demons, and all sorts of other cuties) and transforming yourself into your ideal physical form. CoC2 is a game about customization, letting you play whatever kind of character you want: whether you're a busty bimbo bandit or a chiseled lupine barbarian; a hermaphroditic cowgirl sorceress specialized in milk-magic, or a burly orc warpriest who intimidates his companions back into the fight.

No matter what you choose to transform yourself into, you'll be accompanied on your perverse adventures by a group of eclectic companions, from catgirl clerics and kitsune sorceresses, to chastity-caged elf dickgirls and domineering orc amazons. You can lead two of these companions at a time against a world full of lustful enemies and corrupted magics, building up your party and your own Champion's talents to bring to bear countless combinations of strengths and weaknesses against your demonic foes.

CoC2 is a game about customization, letting you play whatever kind of character you want: whether you're a busty bimbo bandit or a chiseled lupine barbarian; a hermaphroditic cowgirl sorceress specialized in milk-magic, or a burly orc warpriest who intimidates his companions back into the fight.

No matter what you choose to transform yourself into, you'll be accompanied on your perverse adventures by a group of eclectic companions, from catgirl clerics and kitsune sorceresses, to chastity-caged elf dickgirls and domineering orc amazons. You can lead two of these companions at a time against a world full of lustful enemies and corrupted magics, building up your party and your own Champion's talents to bring to bear countless combinations of strengths and weaknesses against your demonic foes.
data.short_description: Corruption of Champions II is an erotic text-based adventure RPG in which you contend with an invasion of perverse demons into your home realm. Romance friends and enemies such as catgirl clerics and kitsune mages, transform your body, and try to defeat the spreading corruption - or surrender to it!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2GHz+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2GHz+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: In-Game Steam Overlay does not work on the Linux version.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10
  • Processor: Dual Core 2GHz+
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 600 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Linux
  • Processor: Dual Core 2GHz+
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 600 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: In-Game Steam Overlay does not work on the Linux version.
